标题: Panerai SUBMERSIBLE BMG-TECH™ - Millimeter Stealth Series Metal Glass Watch 🔥 featuring an original imported automatic mechanical movement ⌚️ crafted with Panerai's new BMG-TECH™ material, known for its high strength and scratch resistance. The bezel is made of Carbotech™ material, which has an irregular matte black appearance, with a unique look based on the cutting method, making each watch one-of-a-kind. The black dial inherits the distinctive features of the previous LUMINOR series, with round markers and skeleton hands for easy recognition, coated with Super-LumiNova® super luminous material for clear time reading in the dark. A date display window is located at the 3 o'clock position, and a small seconds sub-dial is at the 9 o'clock position 🔥.

Panerai Series: Luminor series, Dimensions: Diameter mm, Thickness mm, Dial: Black dial with silver small seconds sub-dial, silver power reserve indicator, and date display, Movement: Automatic movement with power reserve indicator.

The new Luminor Marina series watch from Panerai features a Super-LumiNova luminescent coating, creating a vivid green glow that seems to have an irresistible luminous attraction, as if guiding one through a tunnel of time under the sea, showcasing Panerai's unique Italian green light aesthetics. The watch is equipped with a AISI 316L matte steel case, a unidirectional rotating bezel with engraved hour markers, and Panerai's patented iconic crown-protecting bridge device. It is powered by the latest developed mechanical movement. Panerai continues to produce exquisite high-quality timepieces.

Introducing the heavyweight: Panerai Luminor in white and black. The unique matte black dial combined with a vintage-style beige Assolutamente calf leather strap showcases a distinctive and stylish watch, becoming an ideal choice for watch enthusiasts. The crown protecting bridge is another unique feature following the Radiomir cushion-shaped case, making it instantly recognizable as a Panerai watch. The unique sandblasted dial enhances the viewing experience of the dial. The black dial features Arabic numerals, central hour, minute, second time zone hands, and a small seconds sub-dial with luminescent parts, emitting a captivating green glow in dim lighting, providing clear visibility and convenience. The movement, with all components meticulously decorated by watchmakers, achieves precision comparable to astronomical standards.
